center.name: 山西省
center.summary: 山西省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括褐马鸡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown eared pheasant is distributed in the Xiaowutai Mountains in northwestern Hebei, and in the northwestern Shanxi and Lüliang Mountains regions of China

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The brown eared pheasant is distributed in the Xiaowutai Mountains in northwestern Hebei, and in the northwestern Shanxi and Lüliang Mountains regions of China
